statement: Public voice = the project itself; Nenad's name appears only where it must (whitepapers, grant applications, legal). No founder performance, no personal promotion. The launch story is told matter-of-fact with verifiable receipts: solo builder + AI agent who co-designs, audits, ships, and records her own actions under mandate on the ledger she is building. Elara drafts the flip-day announcement set (Show HN, README story section, how-this-was-built page with on-mesh proofs).
